creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
I noticed that misc/compat7x fails to update properly due libvgl.so.5
is missing in /usr/local/lib/compat directory.

# portmaster misc/compat7x===>  Building package for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310

===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/misc/compat7x

===>>> Gathering distinfo list for installed ports

===>>> Launching 'make checksum' for misc/compat7x in background
===>>> Gathering dependency list for misc/compat7x from ports
===>>> No dependencies for misc/compat7x


===>>> Starting build for misc/compat7x <<<===

===>>> All dependencies are up to date

===>  Cleaning for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
===>>> Waiting on fetch & checksum for misc/compat7x <<<===


===> Fetching all distfiles required by compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310 for building
===>  Extracting for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310.tar.xz.
===>  Patching for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
===>  Configuring for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
===>  Staging for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
===>   Generating temporary packing list
(cd /usr/ports/misc/compat7x/work/compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310/lib && install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 *.so.* /usr/ports/misc/compat7x/work/stage/usr/local/lib/compat)
(cd /usr/ports/misc/compat7x/work/stage/usr/local/lib/compat && /bin/ln -sf /lib/libthr.so.3 libkse.so.3)
====> Compressing man pages
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===>  Building package for compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310
Creating package /usr/ports/misc/compat7x/work/compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310.tbz
Registering depends:.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/misc/compat7x/work/compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310.tbz'
tar: lib/compat/libvgl.so.5: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** [do-package] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/misc/compat7x.

===>>> Installation of compat7x-i386-7.4.704000.201310 (misc/compat7x) failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Killing background jobs
Terminated

===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> misc/compat7x 

===>>> Exiting

Fix: 

Just after I have changed the related entries in pkg-plist.*  it build/install fine.

Furthermore, seems that portmaster(8) prompts to override libkse.so.3  at the end of installation process.

override r--r--r--  root/wheel schg for /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libkse.so.3?
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/misc/compat7x/ && make install clean
or
# portmaster misc/compat7x
